chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-440 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.3713/2024 (S/A) 28-7-2025 Mr. Manzoor Hussain Narejo, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG along with ASI Deedar Ali -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statement has been filed by respondent No.2 along with a copy of FIR No.85/2025 registered at Police Station Pir Jo Goth, District Khairpur, which is taken on record. Perusal of the record reveals that the FIR, in compliance with the Court order, had already been lodged prior to the hearing of instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application. In view thereof, the instant Crl. Misc. Application has become infructuous and is accordingly disposed of along with pending application. However, the learned counsel for the applicant is at liberty to seek appropriate relief before the Court of competent jurisdiction, if so advised. JUDGE Naveed Ali
